---
title: "test_odin_gm.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_odin_gm.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.75
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.00
---

## Intent
The `test_odin_gm.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_odin_gm_offline_fallback, test_odin_gm_describe_outcome_offline. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_odin_gm_offline_fallback, test_odin_gm_describe_outcome_offline. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.gm_client](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.gm_client)

### Exports
- `test_odin_gm_offline_fallback`
- `test_odin_gm_describe_outcome_offline`
